RETURN VERIFICATION LOG
Return ID: _______________  SKU/Job: _______________  Date in: _______________
Support intake summary: _______________
Verification tech: _______________  Protocol: _______________
Outcome: [ ] confirmed-fail  [ ] NDF  [ ] pass-after-return  [ ] inconclusive
Notes: _______________

WEEKLY NDF REVIEW · Week of _______

NDF count: ___  Confirmed fail: ___  Return volume: ___
Top SKU/job NDF: _______________
Top support intake theme: _______________

Action: [ ] cross-train sprint  [ ] intake checklist update  [ ] customer education

METRIC DISPUTE PACKET
Employee: _______________  Metric: _______________

Attached: return log rows + verification protocol + outcome codes.
Rule: ding only when record shows fair test, not opinion.

CROSS-TRAIN SPRINT
Week: _______________

Support → verification bench: [names] [date]
Verification → support intake shadow: [names] [date]
Focus SKU/job: _______________
Success: NDF trend down 4 weeks or intake checklist shipped.

VERIFICATION PROTOCOL REVIEW
SKU/job: _______________  Escaped defect ID: _______________

Gap in protocol: _______________
Revision owner: _______________  Effective date: _______________

CUSTOMER HEALTH CHECK (data-backed)
Account: _______________  Period: _______________

Returns: ___  Confirmed fail %: ___  NDF %: ___
Message: We verify returns. Real failures are reproduced. NDF is tracked and drives training.
Hardware/service validity: supported by verification log, not smoke.

CREDIBILITY RESPONSE

"We log every return outcome: confirmed fail vs no-defect-found. Support metrics tie to verification records. Happy to walk your team through last quarter stats in QBR."

INTAKE CHECKLIST UPDATE (from NDF theme)
SKU/job: _______________
Add before RMA/return authorized:
1. _______________
2. _______________
Owner: support lead  Effective: _______________
